options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: start_level
options.description: Choose which level to start in.

options.name: goal_level
options.description: Choose which level must be completed to finish the game.

options.name: goal_requirement
options.description: Choose the number of levels that must be completed to unlock the goal.

options.name: perfect_goal
options.description: Choose if the goal must be cleared with a perfect rank. Has no effect if the goal level is a secret mission.

options.name: skipped_levels
options.description:
List as many levels as you would like to skip completing for the goal.

Skipped levels will still exist in the item pool, and can still be completed to add progress towards unlocking the goal, but will not be considered in logic.

options.name: auto_exclude_skipped_locations
options.description: Choose if skipped levels should automatically have all of their locations excluded.

options.name: unlock_type
options.description: Choose if levels will be unlocked one at a time, or whole layers at once.

options.name: secret_mission_unlock_type
options.description: Choose if secret missions should be unlocked by using their secret exits, or by finding items in the multiworld.

options.name: secret_exit_behavior
options.description:
Choose if using secret exits should count the current level as completed, or if secret exits should NOT count the 
current level as completed, and instead add rewards for using each secret exit.

Does not affect secret exits leading to prime sanctums.

options.name: trap_percent
options.description: Choose the percentage of trap items that will appear when filling the item pool with junk.

options.name: filler_weights
options.description: Choose the odds of each filler item being created when filling the item pool with junk.

options.name: trap_weights
options.description: Choose the odds of each trap item being created when filling the item pool with traps.

options.name: enemy_rewards
options.description:
Adds rewards for defeating enemies and unlocking terminal entries.

Bosses: Only includes bosses at the end of each act and in Prime Sanctums.

Extra: Also includes some additional bosses that usually only appear once.

All: Includes all bosses and enemies.

options.name: challenge_rewards
options.description: Adds rewards for completing each level's challenge, except for the goal.

options.name: p_rank_rewards
options.description: Adds rewards for completing each level with a Perfect Rank, except for the goal.

options.name: hank_rewards
options.description: Adds rewards for giving Hank and Hank Jr. a head in 1-4 and 5-3.

options.name: randomize_clash_mode
options.description: Randomizes the unlock for destroying all crates in 4-S.

options.name: fish_rewards
options.description: Adds rewards for catching each fish in 5-S.

options.name: cleaning_rewards
options.description: Adds rewards for cleaning every room in 7-S.

options.name: chess_reward
options.description: Adds a reward for winning chess against a bot in the Developer Museum.

options.name: rocket_race_reward
options.description: Adds a reward for winning the rocket race in the Developer Museum.

options.name: starting_weapon_pool
options.description:
Choose a pool of possible starting weapons and their weights of being selected.

Some weapons will not be considered valid depending on other options:

If the start level is 2-3, 8-2, or 8-3, all arms will be removed from the pool.

If choosing to start with Feedbacker, it will be removed from the pool.

If choosing not to start with Feedbacker, the Whiplash, Freezeframe, and all Railcannons are removed from the pool.

If choosing to randomize secondary fire and not to start with Feedbacker, the S.R.S. Cannon and Firestarter are removed from the pool.

If choosing to randomize secondary fire, not to start with Feedbacker, and for the Nailgun to be in its Alternate form, the Overheat is removed from the pool.

options.name: randomize_secondary_fire
options.description:
Locks the ability to use a weapon's alternate fire behind items that must be found in the multiworld.

Split: Separate items will be created for each weapon and secondary fire.

Progressive: Two items will be created for each weapon, the first item found will unlock the weapon, and the second will unlock the secondary fire.

options.name: start_with_arm
options.description: Choose whether or not to start the game with the Feedbacker arm.

options.name: starting_stamina
options.description: Choose how many bars of stamina to start with.

options.name: starting_walljumps
options.description: Choose how many wall jumps to start with.

options.name: start_with_slide
options.description: Choose whether or not to start the game with the ability to slide.

options.name: start_with_slam
options.description: Choose whether or not to start the game with the ability to slam.

options.name: revolver_form
options.description:
Choose whether the revolver should be in its standard or alternate form initially.

The other form must be unlocked.

options.name: shotgun_form
options.description:
Choose whether the shotgun should be in its standard or alternate form initially.

The other form must be unlocked.

options.name: nailgun_form
options.description:
Choose whether the nailgun should be in its standard or alternate form initially.

The other form must be unlocked.

options.name: randomize_skulls
options.description: Turns the red and blue skulls into items that must be found before they will appear in levels.

options.name: randomize_limbo_switches
options.description: Randomizes the four switches in the Limbo layer.

options.name: randomize_violence_switches
options.description: Randomizes the three switches in 7-2.

options.name: point_multiplier
options.description: Multiplies the amount of points earned to reduce grind.

options.name: ui_color_randomizer
options.description:
Randomizes UI colors, either once at the beginning of a run, or every time a level is loaded.

Does not affect item popup colors.

This option can be changed later.

options.name: gun_color_randomizer
options.description:
Randomizes gun colors, either once at the beginning of a run, or every time a level is loaded.

This option can be changed later.

options.name: music_randomizer
options.description:
Randomizes the music that plays during the game.

Some music is never randomized.

options.name: cybergrind_hints
options.description:
Every 5 waves cleared in The Cyber Grind will unlock a hint.

This option can NOT be changed later.

options.name: death_link
options.description:
When you die, everyone dies. The reverse is also true.

This option can be changed later.

options.name: death_link_amnesty
options.description: Choose how many deaths must happen before a death link is sent to the multiworld.

options.name: goal
options.description: This Option has been Removed.

options.name: include_secret_mission_completion
options.description: This Option has been Removed.

options.name: boss_rewards
options.description: This Option has been Removed.

options.name: starting_weapon
options.description: This Option has been Removed.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
options: 0-1: Get 5 kills with a single glass panel
0-5: Don't inflict fatal damage to any enemy
1-1: Complete the level in under 10 seconds
1-2: Do not pick up any skulls
1-4: Do not pick up any skulls
2-2: Beat the level in under 60 seconds
4-2: Kill the Insurrectionist in under 10 seconds
4-4: Reach the boss room in 18 seconds
5-4: Reach the surface in under 10 seconds
8-3: Kill a Power with terminal velocity
8-4: Do not pick up any skulls
Boss: The Corpse of King Minos
Boss: Geryon, Watcher of the Skies

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.

1-2: Do not pick up any skulls

4-4: Reach the boss room in 18 seconds
5-4: Reach the surface in under 10 seconds

8-4: Do not pick up any skulls
Boss: The Corpse of King Minos
Boss: Geryon, Watcher of the Skies

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.

options.name: start_inventory_from_pool
options.description:
Start with the specified amount of these items and don't place them in the world. Example: "Bomb: 1"

The game decides what the replacement items will be.
